name: getFlagShow
description: Returns whether Hierarchical Progressive Survey (HiPS) images are currently displayed.
returnDescription: true if HiPS surveys are visible, false if hidden

name: setFlagShow
description: Shows or hides all Hierarchical Progressive Survey (HiPS) images.

parameters.name: visible
parameters.description: true to show HiPS surveys, false to hide

name: flagShow
description: Property that controls whether HiPS surveys are displayed.
returnDescription: true if HiPS surveys are visible

name: loadSources
description: Starts loading the default HiPS survey sources from online catalog servers.

compatibility.notes: Requires internet connection for first load

name: getSurveyByUrl
description: Searches for and returns a HiPS survey by its URL.
returnDescription: HiPS survey object, or null if not found

name: getState
description: Returns the loading state of HiPS survey sources. Values: 0=Created, 1=Loading, 2=Loaded.

name: state
description: Property that returns the loading state of HiPS survey sources. Read-only.

name: isLoaded
description: Returns whether HiPS survey sources have been successfully loaded.
returnDescription: true if HiPS sources are loaded, false otherwise

name: loaded
description: Property that returns whether HiPS survey sources have been loaded. Read-only.
returnDescription: true if HiPS sources are loaded
